title: Example Book
author: Your Name
description: A starter Book of Tales. Replace this content with your own.

entries.title: The Golden Age of Camelot Begins
entries.body: Replace this with your Age 1 opening passage. This text is read aloud when Age 1 begins.

entries.title: The Quest of the Holy Grail Begins
entries.body: Replace this with your Age 2 opening passage. This text is read aloud when Age 2 begins.

entries.title: The Final Wars of Britain Begin

entries.title: Epilogue
entries.body: Replace this with your epilogue passage. This is read at the very end of the game.
